Name: MyOffice
Description: MyOffice is a company that specializes in office furniture and space planning, design, and sales services. They offer a range of products including workstations, desks, tables, seating, architectural walls, and security systems to enhance workplace efficiency and comfort. Their main functionality includes facilitating office transitions, managing structured cabling, sound masking, access control, and building decommissioning, as well as providing quick shipping options for their furniture needs. MyOffice also offers managed IT services and financing solutions tailored to meet the specific needs of businesses across various industries.

Name: A1 Auto Transport
Description: A1 Auto Transport is a logistics service that specializes in vehicle transportation for cars, motorcycles, boats, and yachts. The company offers tailored transport solutions across the United States and internationally, ensuring safe and efficient shipping from one location to another. Key features include a vetted network of certified carriers, real-time data analysis for competitive pricing, and a focus on customer care throughout the moving process. A1 Auto also provides specialized services for high-value vehicles, including classic cars, electric vehicles, and marine transportation, along with flexible scheduling options and transparent pricing without upfront fees.

Name: ABC Warehouse
Description: ABC Warehouse is a retail store that offers a variety of appliances, including dishwashers, refrigerators, TVs, and mattresses in Michigan, Ohio, and Indiana. The main functionality of the website includes browsing and purchasing appliances, scheduling home delivery or installation services, and providing financing options. Key features include an extended warranty on appliances, a mobile app for easy access to appliance information, and various moving and hauling services for old furniture. Customers can also find promotions and discounts on their purchases through the site.

Name: ACCO Material Handling Solutions
Description: ACCO is a company that provides material handling solutions, including overhead equipment for warehouse and plant operations. Their main functionality includes offering custom quotes, technical support, and training programs tailored to the needs of various industries such as automotive, pharmaceuticals, and food production. Key features include a wide range of products like lifting carts and trailers, an emphasis on safety and efficiency in material handling, and resources for potential dealers to become buyers or partners.

Name: Activo
Description: Activo is a Canadian IT solutions provider that specializes in network infrastructure and hardware services for businesses across multiple locations. Their main offerings include national rollouts, customized network performance optimization, managed services, physical security systems, audio/visual connectivity, voice and collaboration solutions, and carrier services. Activo aims to simplify technology transitions and enhance business communication and efficiency while reducing costs for their clients.

Name: AGS International Movers
Description: AGS International Movers is a global mobility company that provides domestic and international moving services, including secure storage, vehicle transport, and office relocation. The company operates in 147 countries across five continents, assisting over 4,000 families annually with their relocation needs. AGS focuses on customer satisfaction through tailored solutions, security for belongings, and innovative technology to streamline the move process. Their services also include virtual consultations and comprehensive support throughout the relocation journey.

Name: Airports Council International
Description: The Airport Council International-North America (ACI-NA) is an organization that advocates for the interests of airports in North America. Its main purpose is to improve airport operations, safety, and passenger experiences through various initiatives such as airport competition, environmental management, and public safety strategies. ACI- NA also provides research reports, educational programs, and resources to support airport professionals and enhance economic growth and efficiency within the industry.

Name: AirSea Packing Group
Description: AirSea Packing provides logistics services focused on the transportation, storage, and installation of bespoke furniture and art. Their main functionalities include white-glove delivery, international transport for items from major US cities to Europe, and comprehensive inventory management. Key features include personalized support for private clients, a network that offers weekly shipping options, and specialized services for art galleries, dealerships, and realtors. AirSea aims to simplify the logistics process for various industries, including luxury retail, hospitality, and e-commerce.

Name: Alexander's Mobility Services
Description: Alexander's Mobility Services is a moving company that offers a range of relocation, logistics, and storage solutions for individuals and organizations. Their main services include household moving, corporate relocation, commercial moving, international moves, and specialized transportation. Key features include personalized packing assistance, error-free move planning, and the ability to handle complex relocations such as sensitive equipment and medical supplies. The company operates across multiple locations in North America and emphasizes timely and efficient service.

Name: All Points Relocation Service Inc.
Description: All Points Relocation provides corporate and employee relocation services in Canada and globally. Their main functionality includes assisting with residential and business moves, as well as offering immigration services for international students. Key features include customized solutions through a network of logistics partners, comprehensive support throughout the relocation process, and a focus on creating a smooth transition for employees.

Name: American Box Company
Description: American Box Company is a packaging solutions provider that specializes in custom corrugated boxes, displays, and fulfillment services. They design, manufacture, and ship tailored to meet the specific needs of businesses across various industries, including food, pharmaceuticals, and e-commerce. Key features include a focus on quality, quick turnaround times, and a commitment to customer service, ensuring effective packaging solutions that enhance product visibility and operational efficiency.

Name: Atelier 4
Description: Atelier 4 is a logistics company specializing in the transportation, storage, and installation of fine art across four U.S. cities: New York City, Miami, Los Angeles, Charlotte, and Charlotte. They offer climate-controlled transport, custom crating, and comprehensive support for various art projects, including exhibitions and installations. Key features include same-day quotes, ICEFAT-certified logistics, and specialized services like Art Aboard for luxury watercraft on international voyages.

Name: Banc of California
Description: Banc of California is a financial institution that offers a range of banking services for individuals, businesses, and communities across California. Its main functionalities include personal and business banking, lending solutions, credit card management, and payment processing services. Key features include online and mobile banking options, specialized banking for various industries such as multifamily housing, education, government, and venture finance, along with tools for managing payments, treasury management, or asset-based lending. The bank also provides resources for community engagement and financial literacy to support affordable housing and responsible investing.

Name: Benivo
Description: Benivo is a platform that streamlines employee relocation services and offers technology solutions to enhance the management of global mobility. It provides managed services such as VIP mobility, cost estimates, payroll reporting, and vendor management through AI dashboards and automated workflows. Key features include real-time tracking of milestone events, data protection measures, and integration with existing systems to reduce manual effort and improve efficiency in moving employees globally.

Name: Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Florida Realty
Description: Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Florida Realty is a real estate agency that offers services for buying and selling residential, commercial, and luxury properties in Florida. Their main functionalities include providing mortgage assistance, home value reports, and personalized support throughout the buying or selling process. They also offer specialized services such as luxury marketing, relocation assistance, and title and guarantee services, catering to various communities across Central and East Coast Florida.

Name: Blue Moon Estate Sales
Description: Blue Moon Estate Sales is a national network that facilitates estate sales, liquidation, and relocation for individuals and families. The service offers professional staging, market value research, and expert management of the sale process to ensure a smooth transition for clients. They provide free consultations to help determine the best selling options and utilize advanced technology for efficient staging and pricing. Clients can easily search for upcoming estate sales by entering their property's details and preferences.

Name: BNSF Logistics
Description: BNSF Logistics is a logistics company that provides a range of transportation and supply chain services, including rail, flatbed, and expedited freight options. Their main functionality includes project management, engineering solutions, and cross-border shipping for complex moves across various industries such as energy and manufacturing. Key features include custom transport fixtures, inventory management, and risk management to ensure efficient and secure operations for their clients. BNSF also offers specialized services like the delivery of heavy equipment and solar products, along with warehousing solutions tailored to specific industry needs.

Name: Bradford Systems
Description: Bradford Systems provides a range of integrated storage solutions designed to enhance operational efficiency and security for various industries, including education, public safety, healthcare, and retail. Their offerings include high-density mobile storage systems, modular casework, smart lockers, and digital storage solutions that integrate with existing warehouse operations. Key features include customizable shelving options, automated storage management systems, and specialized services like document scanning and compliance support to optimize resource use and improve overall storage performance.

Name: Cartus
Description: Cartus is a corporate relocation company that provides tailored mobility solutions for businesses looking to relocate employees globally. Their main functionality includes managing the entire relocation process, from planning and onboarding to support cultural immersion and settling in new environments. Key features include a global talent mobility program, customizable relocation benefits, and technology-driven strategies that enhance employee experiences and productivity while ensuring compliance with industry standards. Cartus aims to empower clients through flexible mobility and innovative solutions that meet their specific needs.

Name: Castellini
Description: Castellini is a company that provides supply chain services, specializing in frozen and cold storage solutions. Their main functionality includes managing the entire supply chain process from product delivery to distribution, ensuring safety and sustainability in their operations. Key features include a focus on customer service, innovative solutions for complex challenges, and a commitment to excellence in their offerings.

Name: Central Bank
Description: Central Bank offers a range of banking services for personal, business, and corporate customers. Its main functionalities include checking and savings accounts, loans (such as mortgages and auto), credit cards, and digital banking solutions like mobile payments and remote deposit capture. The bank also provides financial planning tools, fraud prevention strategies, and treasury management services to support businesses in managing their finances effectively.

Name: Certified Logistics
Description: Certified Logistics is a corporate relocation and logistics service provider operating in New York, New Jersey, Connecticut, and the Mid-Atlantic region. The company specializes in project management, glass wall distribution, new furniture installation, corporate relocation, change management, and asset management. Their approach focuses on detail-oriented planning and revision of projects to ensure efficient handling of complex logistics needs for clients.

Name: Clark's White Glove Delivery
Description: Clark's White Glove Delivery is a logistics service that specializes in white glove delivery and various moving and storage solutions. They offer services such as furniture assembly, installation, climate-controlled warehouse storage, in-home moving, and furniture repairs. With over 25 years of experience, their trained teams oversee the entire delivery process to ensure smooth and efficient processes for clients across multiple locations in the Midwest.

Name: CMS Companies
Description: CMS Companies is a moving company that offers a range of services including local, long-distance, international, and corporate relocation. They provide customized solutions for residential and business moves, office relocations, and logistics management. Key features include a nationwide network of over 1,500 packing partners, 24/7 customer support, and a focus on efficient move planning and tracking. With over 145 years of combined experience, CMS aims to deliver seamless moving experiences while ensuring client satisfaction.

Name: Coldwell Banker Caine
Description: Coldwell Banker Caine is a real estate agency serving Greenville, Spartanburg, and Western Upstate. The agency offers services for both residential and commercial properties, including buying, selling, or renting homes. They also provide relocation services to help clients find suitable locations in South Carolina. Additionally, Coldwell Bankers Caine supports agents with training and resources to enhance their professional skills in the real estate market.

Name: CompassMSP
Description: CompassMSP is a managed IT and cybersecurity service provider that offers tailored solutions for small to midsized businesses. Their main functionality includes providing 24/7 support, managing Microsoft 365, and offering security advisory services. Key features include compliance management, cloud infrastructure management, data backup and recovery, and AI modernization, all aimed at enhancing operational efficiency and ensuring secure digital experiences. CompassMSP operates across multiple locations in the United States and Canada, focusing on building long-term partnerships with clients to deliver effective technology solutions.

Name: 2026 PC Connection, Inc.
Description: Connection Supply Alert is an online retailer specializing in memory and storage products, particularly for office technology and networking needs. The website offers a wide range of items including computers, printers, servers, networking equipment, and accessories, as well as services such as hardware sales and technical support. Customers can track their orders, access product resources, and find clearance items, making it easy to find the right products for various industries like healthcare, education, and government.

Name: Crane Service Inc
Description: Crane Service Inc. (CSI) provides heavy lift, rigging, heavy haul, and storage services across various industries including construction, mining, government, and healthcare. Their fleet includes over 1,500 cranes and specialized equipment, along with a commitment to safety and timely project completion. CSI offers services such as crane rentals, maintenance, and alternative movement solutions, while also selling used equipment for immediate purchase. The company emphasizes teamwork and has a strong track record of meeting safety standards throughout its operations.

Name: CSA Transportation
Description: Creamy Donuts is a bakery located in Richardson, TX, offering a variety of donuts, cakes, croissants, Danish desserts, and coffee. Customers can order online for carryout or visit the bakery during business hours. The menu features popular items like raspberry-filled donuts and chocolate twist donuts. The bakery emphasizes quality ingredients and customer service, with a focus on providing delicious baked goods.

Name: CubeSmart
Description: CubeSmart offers a variety of self-storage units for rent, including climate-controlled and mini storage options, as well as specialized units for vehicle, RV, and boat storage. Customers can easily find and reserve storage spaces online, manage their accounts, and access services through an app. CubeSmart also provides additional features such as moving assistance, packing supplies, and military discounts on move-in specials. The company emphasizes customer service and aims to create a comfortable and welcoming environment for both new and experienced renters.

Name: CWS Corporate Housing
Description: CWS Corporate Housing provides fully furnished short-term rental apartments for 1-2-3 bedrooms across the United States. The service offers personalized support for relocation and business travel, ensuring a tailored housing experience for clients. Key features include full kitchens, high-speed internet, pet-friendly communities, 24/7 professional management, custom billing, and a single point of contact for inquiries and bookings. CWS also emphasizes sustainability in its operations and is accredited by industry standards.

Name: Cyclonaire
Description: Cyclonaire provides material conveyance solutions for various production phases, including Dense, Semi-Dense, and Dilute Phase processes. Their main functionality includes designing and implementing equipment such as air movers, conveyors, and sanding systems tailored to meet specific industry specifications. Cyclonaire also offers ongoing support through consulting, construction management, field service, and project management, ensuring efficient material handling and safety in operations.

Name: Direct Connect Logistix
Description: Direct Connect Logistix is a transportation and logistics company that offers a range of services including full truckload, intermodal, inter modal, and vehicle relocation. They specialize in cold chain shipping, particularly for the food and beverage industries, and provide tailored transportation solutions such as power-only moves and intermoda freight. The company utilizes advanced technology to enhance the transportation experience for both shippers and carriers, ensuring secure handling and accurate pricing. Customers can request quotes through their dynamic pricing tool and access a customer portal for managing their logistics needs.

Name: DGM Services
Description: DGM Services is a packing and crating company that specializes in dangerous goods transport. They offer a variety of services including custom export packing, chemical packing solutions, container loading, and training for personnel involved in hazardous materials handling. DGM also provides onsite and online training programs to ensure compliance with regulations such as the IATA/CBTA 7.3 policy and has multiple locations across Texas, Florida, and Louisiana. Their goal is to help clients secure the safe transport of their cargo while maintaining employee safety and professionalism.

Name: Dircks Moving & Logistics
Description: Dircks Moving & Logistics is a full-service moving company based in Phoenix, Arizona, specializing in both residential and business moves. They offer a range of services including local and international moving, packing, storage, auto transport, and logistics management for various industries such as technology and office spaces. The company emphasizes customer satisfaction and provides tailored solutions to meet the specific needs of families and businesses, ensuring efficient and peace of mind throughout the moving process. Dircks is affiliated with Mayflower Van Lines and has over 35 years of experience in the moving industry, holding multiple awards for customer satisfaction.

Name: DuraServ LLC
Description: DuraServ offers a range of services and products for both commercial and residential clients. Their main functionalities include the installation and maintenance of overhead doors, loading dock equipment, gate systems, and climate control solutions. They also provide garage door installation, repair and maintenance, and private label distribution of high-quality door products tailored to specific needs. Additionally, DuraServ features safety equipment designed for loading docks and offers various accessories like impact-resistant steel doors and HVLS fans.

Name: Express Flooring
Description: Express Flooring offers a shop-at-home flooring installation service that allows homeowners to explore and purchase various flooring options, including carpet, luxury vinyl plank, hardwood, laminate, and tile. The company provides free in-home estimates, expert installation services, and a lifetime installation warranty. Their team of design consultants assists customers with selecting from hundreds of samples, ensuring quality and affordability for their homes. Express Flooring also features special promotions and financing options tailored to different budgets and needs.

Name: Fehr & Peers
Description: Fehr & Peers is a transportation solutions company that specializes in planning and engineering for public and private sectors. They focus on creating safer and more effective transport systems that enhance community living. Their services include research and development (R&D) to address innovative challenges in transportation, as well as the creation of sustainable mobility solutions. The firm has worked with various cities across multiple states, emphasizing collaboration and innovation in their projects.

Name: First Merchants Bank
Description: First Merchants Bank offers a range of financial services for personal and business needs, including checking and savings accounts, credit cards, mortgages, loans, and online banking. The bank provides tools for managing finances through mobile apps, allowing customers to pay bills early and avoid overdrafts. Additionally, it features wealth management solutions, retirement planning, and various loan options tailored for small businesses and professionals, all supported by FDIC-insured services. First Merchants aims to enhance the financial wellness of diverse communities while ensuring customer service and support.

Name: FlexQube
Description: FlexQube offers a range of modular material handling solutions designed for various industries, focusing on automation and ergonomic control in material flow management. Their products include pallet and container carts, shelf carts, flow carts, and specialized units like lift runners and mother-daughter carts, all aimed at improving operational efficiency and reducing labor costs. FlexQube's systems are customizable to meet specific business needs, allowing for easy configuration and customization to fit different operations. The company also provides aftermarket services and has over 20 years of experience in the industry, serving more than 1,000 companies worldwide.

Name: Flood Brothers
Description: Flood Brothers is a commercial moving company that provides a range of relocation services for businesses across various industries, including office furniture installation, laboratory moving, fitness equipment installation, and warehouse relocation. Their main functionality includes project-managed moving, storage solutions, and logistics support to ensure smooth transitions into new workspaces. Key features include certified installation by trained professionals, a network of transportation resources, and a commitment to timely and professional service throughout the moving process.

Name: Folo3
Description: Fotografia is a photography studio that offers various photography services, including portrait photography, street photography, abstract photography, and filmography. The studio provides in-person and online courses for both beginners and experienced photographers, covering topics such as visual storytelling, editing, and cinematography. Additionally, it features an archive of personal portraits and global street photography collections that tell compelling stories through detailed images. Clients can book shooting sessions or workshops tailored to their specific needs, with flexible scheduling options available based on individual preferences.

Name: Fry-Wagner Moving & Storage
Description: Fry-Wagner Moving and Storage is a logistics company that provides a range of moving and moving services for both residential and commercial clients. Their main functionalities include local, long-distance, international, and employee relocation, as well as warehousing, distribution, and installation services. Key features include customized relocation plans, nationwide inventory management, and the ability to handle over 1 million moves annually across the United States and internationally. The company emphasizes safety, quality service, and customer satisfaction through virtual surveys and expert guidance throughout the moving process.

Name: Gamer Packaging
Description: Gamer Packaging provides custom packaging solutions for various industries, including food and beverage, pharmaceuticals, health and beauty, and consumer goods. Their services encompass initial concept development, quality assurance testing, and warehousing, ensuring that products meet high-quality standards throughout the supply chain. They offer a complete range of packaging solutions, from sourcing from manufacturers to creating unique canopies, and provide decorating services to enhance brand visibility and functionality. Additionally, Gamer Packages supports clients with flexible financing options and has experience working with children's charities and pet owners.

Name: Global Tech Solutions
Description: Global Tech Solutions provides IT support and services for businesses across various industries, including healthcare, education, and retail. Their main functionalities include managed IT services, cybersecurity, cloud computing, hardware repair, and business continuity solutions. Key features encompass 24/7 help desk support, remote monitoring, network security, and tailored IT consulting to enhance operational efficiency and drive growth.
Street: 2964 New Jersey 311 Blvd Of The Americas

Name: The Armstrong Company
Description: The Armstrong Company is a full-service moving, storage, and logistics company that provides comprehensive solutions for both residential and business moves. They offer a range of services including transportation, warehousing, and supply chain management to ensure the movement of goods across various locations worldwide. With over 68 years of experience, their team collaborates closely with clients to handle all aspects of the move process, from packing and storage to final delivery. The company also features resources such as checklists, blog posts, and customer support to assist with moving planning and operations.

Name: GoShare Inc.
Description: GoShare is a same-day delivery and moving service that connects customers with vetted drivers for last mile deliveries, middle mile logistics, and moving across the United States. Users can easily book services through a mobile app, receive real-time updates on their shipments, and track their progress in one place. GoShare offers various vehicle types, including box trucks, cargo vans, and pickups, and provides flexible scheduling options to accommodate different needs. The platform utilizes machine learning for accurate pricing and has over 65,000 verified delivery professionals to ensure reliable service.

Name: Graebel Companies Inc.
Description: Graebel provides global relocation services and mobility solutions for employees, including executives and interns. Their main functionality is to support the entire relocation process through a range of services such as pre-decision support, departure services, destination assistance, settling in, and repatriation. Key features include a technology platform called Graebel CitySwitcher for seamless moving processes, customized talent mobility strategies, and tools that enhance visibility and efficiency during transitions. Graebels aims to create personalized experiences while optimizing program costs and ensuring diversity and inclusion.

Name: Grafton
Description: Grafton is a global recruitment and human resources (HR) service that connects companies with qualified professionals across various industries. The company offers solutions such as permanent recruitment, temporary hiring, talent acquisition consulting, and employer-of-record services. Grafton operates in multiple countries and provides insights on hiring trends, career changes, and organizational strategies to enhance employee engagement and productivity.

Name: Guidepost
Description: Guidepost is a law firm that provides investigations, compliance, security, and risk management services for various industries including education, healthcare, government, and finance. Its main functionality includes conducting corporate investigations, managing regulatory compliance, and providing cybersecurity consulting to help organizations identify risks and develop effective strategies. Key features include due diligence, technology advisory services, and specialized security solutions tailored for educational institutions, healthcare providers, and government agencies. The firm also offers training programs and resources to enhance organizational safety and operational efficiency.

Name: Handling Specialty
Description: Handling Specialty is a manufacturer of custom material handling equipment and systems, specializing in scissor lifts, rail equipment, work positioners, guided vehicles, and various lifting devices. The company offers engineering services for designing and installing tailored solutions for industries such as aerospace, automotive, energy, and manufacturing. Key features include a wide range of products like robotic lift systems, flooring hoists, conveyors, and hydraulic systems, along with maintenance services to ensure optimal operation and operational efficiency. Handling Specialty also provides parts and services for their equipment, including repairs, inspections, and training.

Name: HardingPoorman
Description: HardingPoorman is a full-service print and brand communications company that offers a variety of services to enhance marketing efforts. Their main functionalities include commercial printing, on-demand printing, custom packaging, signage, direct mail, eCommerce solutions, fulfillment, inventory management, mobile engagement, and creative services. They focus on providing quality service with timely delivery, responsive communication, and tailored solutions for various industries such as retail, government, and healthcare.

Name: ITW Hartness
Description: ITW Hartness provides packaging machinery and solutions designed to enhance the efficiency of secondary packaging across various industries, including food, beverage, and personal care. Their main offerings include Dynamic Accumulators for managing product flow, Mass Flow Accumulation systems for buffering and pressureless handling, and Case Packaging systems that support both standard and specialized needs. Additionally, ITW Hartnesses offers training, audits, and refurbishment programs to ensure optimal performance and customer satisfaction.

Name: Higher Information Group, LLC.
Description: Higher Information Group (HIG) provides a range of technology solutions for businesses in Pennsylvania and New York, focusing on office technology, IT services, document management, security, marketing, and marketing. Their main functionality includes optimizing technology strategies, enhancing security, and improving operational efficiency to help organizations reduce costs and improve safety. Key features include managed IT services for IT support, cloud solutions, document storage services, and integrated marketing strategies such as content development and website design. HIG aims to simplify technology selection and provide tailored solutions that align with clients' specific needs across various industries.

Name: Hilldrup
Description: Hilldrup is a moving, logistics, and workplace solutions company that offers a range of services for both residential and corporate relocation. Their main functionalities include local, long-distance, and international moving, as well as specialized warehousing, asset management, and employee mobility services. Hilldrup also provides transportation solutions such as freight forwarding, final mile delivery, and program management to ensure smooth operations across various industries including healthcare, retail, and government.

Name: International Association of Movers
Description: The International Association of Movers (IAM) is an organization that supports moving companies and suppliers in the global moving industry. It offers resources such as a directory for finding certified moving professionals, training programs, and tools to enhance operational efficiency and ethical standards. Key features include the IAMTrusted Moving Company program, e-learning courses, and access to a Mobility Exchange for tracking compliance issues and managing supplier information. Members can also participate in events like annual meetings and awards ceremonies to promote professional development and collaboration within the industry.
Street: 1600 Please Refer To The Table Below

Name: International Industrial Contracting Corporation
Description: International Industrial Contracting Corporation (IICC) is a full-service industrial contracting company that specializes in the installation and relocation of heavy machinery and equipment across various industries, including automotive, manufacturing, transportation, and food and beverage. Their main services include project management, equipment maintenance, millwright services, steel services, and shutdown and turnaround operations. IICC focuses on providing quality workmanship and competitive pricing while ensuring safety and efficiency throughout their projects.

Name: Imlach Group
Description: Imlach Group is a moving company that provides residential, commercial, and corporate relocation services across the United States. They offer professionally managed moving solutions for homeowners, office and industrial relocations, local, long-distance, international, and specialized moves such as medical and laboratory relocations. Additionally, Imlach group provides logistics services including warehousing, distribution, and transportation, catering to projects like museum and fine art relocations and exhibitions. Established in 1924, they focus on delivering clear communication, careful handling, and predictable pricing to ensure smooth and efficient moving experiences.

Name: Iron Mountain, Inc.
Description: Iron Mountain is a global information management company that provides various services including transportation, operations, sales, technology, and data center solutions. Its main purpose is to support businesses in enhancing their physical and digital information while ensuring compliance with industry standards. Key features include a diverse workforce across multiple sectors, a focus on sustainability, and a commitment to equal employment opportunities for individuals with disabilities. Iron Mountain also offers resources such as career development programs and a dedicated portal for customer support and payment processing.

Name: Kinetic Advantage
Description: Kinetic Advantage is an independent floorplan company that provides financing solutions for independent dealerships. Its main functionality includes offering flexible loan options such as consumer loans and buybacks, with terms up to 180 days. The company manages inventory through over 900 digital and physical auctions, allowing dealers to track their sales, manage titles, and access reporting tools. Additionally, Kinetic Advantage supports dealer-to-dealer purchases and trade-ins, helping dealerships grow by maintaining a healthy cash flow and improving operational efficiency.

Name: Knowledge Anywhere
Description: Knowledge Anywhere is a centralized online training platform designed for businesses to manage and track their training programs. It offers features such as AI-driven assessments, course conversion tools, customizable training paths, eCommerce integration, and real-time compliance tracking. The platform supports over 60,000 professionally made courses and provides dedicated support for moving content, ensuring that organizations can effectively enhance employee engagement and knowledge retention.

Name: KONE
Description: KONE is a global company that specializes in the design, installation, and maintenance of elevators and escalators for various industries, including residential, retail, office, hotels, and public sector. Their main functionality includes providing innovative elevator solutions, predictive maintenance services, and tools for building management. Key features include 24/7 service support, advanced people flow solutions, and a focus on sustainability through energy-efficient designs and retrofitting. KONE operates across more than 60 countries, ensuring reliable and efficient transportation for users.

Name: Liquidity Services, Inc.
Description: Liquidity Services provides solutions for managing surplus assets across various industries. Their main functionalities include asset sales and marketing, asset valuation, and direct retail solutions to convert customer returns into cash. They offer data-backed insights to help organizations maximize the value of their assets, manage auctions, and facilitate online transactions that allow customers to buy items in a secure manner.

Name: Manning Group
Description: Manning Group is a furniture services company based in Arizona that offers installation, relocation, and warehousing solutions. They specialize in custom-manufactured architectural walls, moveable walls, and turn-key management of commercial spaces such as offices and call centers. The company operates its own climate-controlled warehouse for efficient product handling and has a strong safety program with all employees certified. Manning Group also provides customer service support through multiple channels, including phone, email, and live chat.

Name: Matcom
Description: Matcom Ontario is a contractor specializing in industrial machinery moving, rigging, and millwrighting. They provide services such as machinery moving (including complex mechanical installations), repairs, upgrades, parts sales, fabrication, lubrication systems, and warehousing solutions. With over 40 years of experience, Matcom focuses on delivering efficient and reliable service tailored to the needs of various industries, ensuring compliance with safety standards and timely project completion.

Name: McCollister's
Description: McCollister's Global Services provides specialized transportation and logistics solutions for various industries, including high-value electronics, medical equipment, and military relocations. Their offerings include auto transport and warehouse distribution, as well as a comprehensive solution for residential and commercial relocation needs. Key features include real-time tracking of shipments, service guarantees, and a focus on customer service to ensure efficient operations. The company operates across multiple locations and is recognized for its commitment to quality and reliability in the industry.

Name: Merchants Fleet
Description: Merchant Fleet is a fleet management company that provides tailored solutions for businesses of all sizes across various industries. Its main services include vehicle management, maintenance, remarketing, and vehicle leasing, along with telematics for tracking driver performance and cost control. The company offers a range of tools to optimize fleet operations, manage fuel supply chain efficiency, and support sustainability efforts, ensuring that vehicles remain operational and at peak performance. Merchants Fleet also emphasizes hands-on assistance and customer satisfaction through a strong team with over 60 years of experience in the industry.

Name: MetCredit
Description: MetCredit is a commercial and consumer debt collection agency that helps businesses recover outstanding accounts receivable. The service offers a streamlined process for individuals and small businesses, utilizing advanced technology such as AI algorithms to identify payment opportunities and predictive intelligence. MetCredit operates across Canada, providing 24/7 support, reporting delinquent or paid accounts to major credit bureaus, and ensuring compliance with legal requirements. Their goal is to increase cash flow and improve the overall success of debt recovery efforts.

Name: Meyer, Inc.
Description: Meyer is a logistics, relocation, and storage solutions company that provides services for various industries including corporate healthcare, education, and manufacturing. Its main functionalities include office moving, project management, furniture installation, and records management. Meyer also offers commercial storage solutions with flexible pricing options and operates multiple locations across the United States. The company focuses on delivering personalized service to help clients navigate their relocation needs effectively.

Name: Michigan Box Company
Description: Michigan Box Co. specializes in custom corrugated packaging for various industries, including food and beverage, automotive, e-commerce, and retail. The company offers a range of services such as digital prototyping, box performance testing, assembly and fulfillment, and ready-to-ship packaging. They manage their own production lines and fleet, ensuring fast turnaround times and reliable quality for their clients' packaging needs. Michigan Box Co., also emphasizes sustainability by planting trees for every order they handle.

Name: Interstate Group Holdings Inc.
Description: Interstate Moving & Storage is a full-service moving company based in Springfield, VA, offering residential, commercial, and corporate relocation services. Their main functionality includes planning and executing moves such as local, long-distance, international, military, and office relocations. Key features include personalized moving plans, project management for safe storage of belongings, and a commitment to customer satisfaction with an ISO 9001:2015 certification. They operate across multiple locations in the D.C. region and provide logistics solutions like freight forwarding and GPS tracking.

Name: Movement Mortgage, LLC
Description: Movement Mortgage is a mortgage company that provides home loans and refinancing services. Its main purpose is to simplify the mortgage process for borrowers by offering quick loan options, personalized support, and efficient servicing. Key features include a client portal for managing payments, access to mortgage calculators, and a commitment to community impact through Movement Schools, which operates a free public charter school in underserved areas. The company also emphasizes employee development and has established partnerships with various lenders to enhance its service offerings.

Name: My Shipping Containers
Description: My Shipping Containers is a company that specializes in the sale and rental of portable storage containers, including refrigerated and insulated options. They offer both new and used containers for purchase and leasing, catering to various industries such as shipping lines, construction companies, and government agencies. The company provides a range of container sizes and types, along with delivery and relocation services, ensuring efficient storage solutions for businesses and individuals. Customers can choose from multiple payment methods, including wire transfers and bank deposits, while also benefiting from global shipping and customer service support.

Name: National Arbitration and Mediation
Description: The National Arbitration and Mediation (NAM) provides alternative dispute resolution services, including arbitration, mediation, and mass arbitrations, primarily in New York State. Their main functionality is to facilitate legal settlements through various arbitration methods such as Competitive Action Law (ADR), which involves multiple judges and attorneys working together to resolve disputes without compensation or fees. NAM also offers case management services, virtual ADR options, and a public arbitration registry for businesses that wish to submit contractual arbitration clauses. The organization focuses on delivering high-quality service and expertise in the fields of employment law, personal injury, financial transactions, and more.

Name: National Cart
Description: National Cart provides custom material handling and storage solutions for businesses of all sizes. Their product range includes various types of carts such as picking carts, industrial carts, and distribution carts, designed to enhance safety, efficiency, and durability in operations. The company operates three manufacturing facilities with a focus on quality and timely delivery, ensuring that their equipment meets specific business needs while maintaining high service reliability.

Name: NOW CFO
Description: NOW CFO is a financial consulting firm that provides outsourced accounting and finance services to businesses, particularly those growing. Their main functionality includes offering executive-level financial expertise through tailored solutions like budgeting, financial planning, bookkeeping, and strategic insights. Key features include a complimentary consultation to understand client needs, ongoing transparency throughout the engagement process, and permanent hiring of qualified accountants who align with business growth strategies.

Name: Office Express
Description: Office Express is a family-owned business that provides furniture, office supplies, and printing services for commercial spaces. Their main offerings include commercial interiors, interior design, moving and reconfiguration, and custom print and promotional products. They also offer a range of janitorial and breakroom supplies, as well as apparel, signage, and displays, catering to various industries such as healthcare, education, and government. The company focuses on delivering cost-effective solutions tailored to meet the specific needs of businesses in sectors like education, government, and corporate hospitality.

Name: Opportune
Description: Opportune Company is a financial services firm specializing in energy advisory and business process outsourcing. It provides solutions for complex financial reporting, tax compliance, and investment banking across various industries, including oil, gas, healthcare, and technology. Key features include IPO support, dispute management, and the ability to manage complex transactions efficiently while ensuring regulatory compliance. The company aims to help clients achieve their strategic goals through tailored consulting services and technology integration.

Name: OptimalShip
Description: OptimalShip is a shipping service that offers various solutions for both international and domestic shipments. Its main functionalities include obtaining shipping quotes, preparing shipping documents, scheduling pickups, and tracking shipments. Key features include an online bill pay tool for secure payment processing, customer support with assistance during customs issues, and the ability to generate customized shipping documents tailored to client needs.

Name: Paxton Companies
Description: Paxton Companies provides transportation and logistics services, specializing in both domestic and international moving and storage solutions. Their main functionality includes handling office moves, cargo transport, household goods, and record-keeping for businesses of all sizes. Paxton emphasizes professionalism, efficiency, and customer satisfaction throughout the move process, backed by a commitment to honest and responsible service.

Name: Pipp Mobile
Description: Pipp Mobile offers mobile storage systems designed to enhance inventory processing and efficiency in various industries, including retail, healthcare, and industrial environments. Their products include mobile carriages, shelving systems, hanger management tools, work tables, and secured storage solutions that can increase storage capacity by up to 80%. Pipp Mobile also provides tailored solutions for national installations and international transportation, ensuring a streamlined workflow and improved overall store operations.

Name: Plus Printers
Description: Plus Printers is a company that specializes in custom packaging solutions, including retail boxes, food boxes, cosmetics, and e-commerce packaging. They offer a wide range of printing services such as logo design, branding, and structural engineering to create tailored packaging for various industries. Key features include fast turnaround times, competitive pricing, and the ability to print on both domestic and international materials, ensuring high-quality products with durable designs. Plus Printers also provides free quotes and has over 30 years of experience in the packaging industry, serving clients across multiple industries.

Name: Position Imaging Inc.
Description: Position Imaging is a technology company that provides real-time tracking and localization of assets using computer vision and radio frequency tracking. Their solutions cater to various environments, including supply chain management, retail, travel, and commercial spaces. Key features include real- time live location intelligence, precise GPS positioning, and advanced analytics for operational efficiency and safety. The technology aims to enhance the visibility and accuracy of assets in high-traffic areas while improving overall performance and customer satisfaction.

Name: Premier Trailers, LLC
Description: Premier Trailers is a commercial fleet leasing and rental service specializing in trailers, including dry vans, reefers, flatbeds, and chassis. The company offers a range of services such as trailer availability by location, maintenance support, and real-time tracking to optimize fleet performance. Key features include a digital dashboard for managing trailers, personalized customer service, fuel savings options, and specialized solutions like refrigeration transportation and emergency trailer services. Premier Trailer Leasing operates over 40 branches across the U.S., providing tailored leasing options and comprehensive support for businesses looking to expand their cargo operations.

Name: Preowned Auto Logistics
Description: Preowned Auto Logistics (PAL) is a service that specializes in nationwide auto transport for used cars. It offers door-to-door and enclosed carriers, as well as specialized services for individuals, corporate relocations, and international shipping needs. Customers can obtain an instant quote for their transportation needs through a network of vetted carriers, receive communication throughout the process, and benefit from discounts on moving vehicles. PAL aims to provide reliable and stress-free logistics solutions tailored to the needs of dealerships and other businesses.

Name: Prima Systems
Description: Prima Systems is a global business process outsourcing (BPO) provider specializing in the healthcare and automotive industries. The company offers a range of services including managed healthcare, IT support, customer experience management, and cloud solutions tailored for healthcare providers and businesses. Key features include medical billing and coding, patient engagement tools, inventory management, financial management, and omnichannel service reconciliation, all aimed at enhancing operational efficiency and improving customer satisfaction. Prima Systems operates from multiple locations worldwide, providing customized solutions to meet specific client needs.

Name: Pro4ia
Description: Pro4ia is a managed service provider that specializes in technology management for high-stakes environments. Their main services include managed security and project management (MSP), technology relocation, and IT support tailored to organizations of all sizes. Key features include continuous monitoring, compliance visibility, and a focus on risk assessment and timely delivery, ensuring that digital assets are protected and operational continuity. Pro4ia also offers tools like ActiveCareTM for tracking asset performance and managing projects effectively.

Name: Pyramid Logistics
Description: Pyramid Logistics is a logistics company that provides a range of transportation and management services for high-value assets, including trade shows, event logistics, and entertainment. Their main functionalities include airfreight and expedited shipping, customized warehousing, climate-controlled storage, and project management for various industries such as film, retail, and experiential marketing. Key features include a network of warehouse partners, a commitment to timely delivery, and a focus on problem-solving to ensure the safe and timely delivery of goods for clients across the United States and internationally.

Name: Quality Move Management Inc.
Description: Quality Move Management Inc. (QMM) is a Canadian moving and storage company that offers local, long-distance, and international moving services for individuals and businesses. They provide packing, crating, and secure storage solutions, as well as self-storage options. QMM is affiliated with Allied Van Lines and specializes in cross-border moves, ensuring compliance with international laws and providing reliable estimates through their virtual video move estimate. Their team consists of experienced movers who focus on customer service throughout the moving process.

Name: Realstar Corp.
Description: Realstar Corp. is a Canadian real estate company that offers rental apartments across nearly 200 communities in Canada. Their main functionality includes providing high-quality living spaces with amenities such as low VOC paints, 24/7 service support, and flexible lease terms. They also offer a mobile app for residents to manage their applications, make payments, and book elevators online. Realstar emphasizes community engagement through bus services and social events, while ensuring customer satisfaction throughout the moving process.

Name: Relocity
Description: Relocity is a platform that streamlines the relocation process for employees and organizations through technology and personalized support. It offers a range of solutions, including self-serve apps for employees to manage their moves, a centralized platform for managing supplier information, and white-glove destination services tailored to various types of talent mobility. Key features include real-time visibility, trained professionals for service delivery, and tools for improving efficiency and reducing program costs while enhancing employee experiences.

Name: RoadEx America, Inc.
Description: The website offers resources and information related to various aspects of life, including health, safety, education, and entrepreneurship. It provides details on specific topics such as mental health, economic development, and the impact of technology like AI and blockchain. Users can access news updates, educational materials, and tips for maintaining their personal data. The site also features a community space called Culturators, which connects individuals with local businesses and organizations.

Name: Schumacher Cargo Logistics
Description: Schumacher Logistic is a shipping company that specializes in international vehicle and car import services, as well as moving household goods, boats, and other cargo. They provide tailored logistics solutions for importing vehicles from various countries, including the USA, Canada, Australia, and New Zealand. Key features include online tracking of shipments, customs assistance, and specialized services like lift-on and roll-off transportation, ensuring efficient and reliable delivery throughout the moving process.

Name: SD Mayer Advisory, LLC
Description: SD Mayer is a full-service accounting, advisory, and wealth management firm based in the San Francisco Bay Area. The firm offers a range of services including audit and assurance, tax planning, business transformation, financial reporting, and specialized consulting for nonprofits and small businesses. Key features include outsourced CFO services, cloud-based accounting solutions, succession planning, and retirement plan consulting, all aimed at supporting clients throughout their financial journey and achieving their goals.

Name: SelfStorage.com
Description: SelfStorage.com is a platform that helps users find and book self-storage units across the United States. It offers a wide range of storage facilities, including climate-controlled, vehicle, and business storage options, with over 20,000 locations in the country. Users can search for available units based on size, type, and amenities, and the site provides tools to compare pricing, reviews, and customer service options. The platform also features an online move-in process and quick confirmation times for customers looking to rent or buy storage facilities.

Name: SGT Auto Transport Corp.
Description: SGT Auto Transport is a car shipping service that specializes in transporting vehicles across the United States and Canada. The company offers various transport options, including door-to-door, open car transport, express auto transport, and guaranteed pick-up services. Key features include 24/7 order tracking, competitive pricing based on market demand, and advanced route planning technology to ensure timely delivery. SGT also provides resources for customers, such as FAQs, tips, and industry trends related to car shipping.

Name: Sirva Worldwide, Inc.
Description: Sirva Worldwide Relocation & Moving Services provides a range of relocation and moving solutions for both corporate clients and personal clients. Their services include corporate relocation, HR/Mobility programs, compensation consulting, and various moving products such as household goods and commercial moving. Sirva operates in over 190 countries, offering tailored solutions to meet the specific needs of their clients while ensuring a flexible and reliable moving experience. The company emphasizes research-driven insights to inform its decisions and supports individuals with disabilities during their moves.

Name: Smart City Locating
Description: Smart City Locating is a service that helps individuals find and book apartments in various cities across Texas, including Atlanta, Austin, Dallas, Denver, Fort Worth, and San Antonio. The platform offers personalized moving concierge services, which include assistance with utilities, WiFi setup, and insurance for moves. Users can easily search for suitable apartment spaces based on their preferences and budget, ensuring a streamlined process for finding the right place to live or work in their desired location.

Name: SmartMoving
Description: SmartMoving is an all-in-one software and CRM designed specifically for moving companies. Its main functionality includes automating sales processes, scheduling, managing customer interactions, and handling billing and accounting tasks to enhance profitability. Key features include automated lead-to-booked job management, real-time reporting, a dedicated success manager for onboarding support, and customizable tools that fit the specific needs of each company. The platform aims to streamline operations, improve efficiency, and increase revenue through streamlined processes and improved communication with customers.

Name: Solutions Metrix
Description: Metholodogy is a consulting firm that specializes in customer relationship management (CRM) solutions, particularly for Salesforce and Microsoft Dynamics 365. They offer services such as CRM implementation, optimization, system integration, and ongoing support to enhance customer relationships and improve operational efficiency. Their approach focuses on creating tailored strategies based on organizational goals, ensuring user adoption, and providing industry best practices to drive growth and innovation across various industries.

Name: Storage Rentals of America
Description: Storage Rentals of America (SROA) provides affordable self-storage solutions for individuals and businesses. Customers can find nearby storage units, reserve them online, and manage their accounts through a range of options, including month-to-month leases and climate-controlled storage. The facilities feature 24/7 video surveillance, gated access, and resources like moving checklists and packing tips to assist customers in organizing their belongings. SROA aims to simplify the storage process for personal belongings, business inventory, and seasonal items.

Name: Staples
Description: St Staples is an online store that offers a wide range of office supplies, including paper, printers, furniture, cleaning supplies, and technology products. The main functionality of the website allows customers to browse and purchase items such as desktops, laptops, safety equipment, and school supplies. Key features include custom print services, promotional products, and special deals on various products, along with options for shipping and moving supplies. Customers can also access resources like eBooks and newsletters to stay informed about trends and new product arrivals.

Description: Sterling Corporation provides moving and logistics services for both commercial and residential clients. Their main functionality includes organizing the entire move process from planning to completion, ensuring a smooth experience for individuals and organizations. Key features include specialized transportation, warehousing, furniture installation, and recycling of items that are no longer viable after the move. They also offer project management services, including in-person consultations and expert management for various industries such as healthcare, technology, and manufacturing.

Name: StorageMart
Description: StorageMart offers a variety of self-storage units across multiple locations in the United States and Canada. The service provides secure, clean storage solutions for individuals, businesses, military personnel, and students, along with specialized options like climate-controlled storage, vehicle storage, and boat storage. Customers can easily find nearby StorageMart units through an online search tool, and the company emphasizes customer support and personalized assistance throughout the rental process. Additional features include a mobile app for easy access to unit information and pricing, as well as resources for packing and moving tips.

Name: StoragePRO
Description: StoragePRO is a self-storage service that offers secure storage solutions across 140 locations in California, New York, and other states. The main functionality includes providing customers with access to various unit sizes, such as XS, 10x10, and XL, along with services like online payment, bill payments, and customer support. StoragePRO also offers additional features like free shipping on orders over $100 and a Touchless Rentals™ program for easier rental management.

Name: Sunrise Senior Living
Description: SPES Super Speciality Hospital offers a range of healthcare services including emergency care, general medicine, pediatrics, and specialized medical treatments. The hospital provides 24/7 emergency care through its emergency department and employs advanced medical professionals for various conditions such as neurology, neurosurgery, neonatology, urology, and respiratory health. Additionally, SPES has a pharmacy that offers convenient access to medications at any time and is equipped with modern facilities for patient comfort and treatment.

Name: SRE
Description: SRE is a company that provides crane rental, rigging, steel erection, and warehouse services. They offer operated and maintained crane rentals for various load capacities ranging from 4 to 550 tons, as well as specialized rigging, heavy transport, and custom steel fabrication. Additionally, SRE offers warehousing solutions with 92,000 square feet of indoor and outdoor storage across multiple locations in the Southeast, catering to industries such as aerospace, aviation, healthcare, and construction.

Name: Superior Van & Mobility
Description: Superior Van & Mobility offers a range of new and used wheelchair vans, power lifts, and mobility solutions for individuals with disabilities. Their main functionality includes selling accessible vehicles, providing rental options for short-term or long-term use, and offering customized modifications to meet individual mobility needs. Key features include a wide selection of commercial commercial vehicle models, financing options, and free consultations with mobility consultants to help customers find the right vehicle for their lifestyle requirements. The company also provides after-hours service appointments and installation support for ADA-compliant equipment.

Name: TAB
Description: TAB offers a range of storage and labeling solutions for businesses to manage their document assets efficiently. Their main products include file folders, labels, storage cabinets, and mobile metal shelving, all designed to enhance the security and efficiency of data management. TAB also provides services such as electronic records management, document imaging, and offsite box audits to help organizations transition to digital workflows and improve compliance with regulations. Additionally, they offer custom labeling services and smart lockers tailored to specific needs.

Name: InStore Group
Description: InStore Group is a retail merchandising company that provides comprehensive in-store execution services for brands, wholesalers, and sales agencies. Their main functionality includes managing inventory, resets, stock rotation, product ordering, and planogram Merchandising to ensure timely delivery of goods across multiple stores. Key features include real-time data visibility, custom dashboards and analytics, in-house auditing, and a focus on national coverage and reliability, allowing clients to focus on growth without the burden of managing their own operations.

Name: The USIM
Description: USIM is a full-service media planning and buying agency that specializes in media marketing services. It offers a range of solutions including media buying, research, analytics, advanced media strategies, and integrated media planning to enhance brand visibility and effectiveness. Key features include AI-based targeting and optimization through mixed media budgets, bespoke trade zones for precise lead generation, and omnicultural media strategies tailored for multicultural consumers. The agency focuses on delivering measurable results and improving return on investment (ROI) for its clients through data-driven insights and technology.

Name: Tosca Services, LLC
Description: Tosca offers reusable packaging solutions designed to improve supply chain efficiency and sustainability. Their products include crates, bins, pallets, and dollies that can be used in various industries such as food, agriculture, and online grocery. Tosca provides services like automation consulting, compliance advice, and training to help businesses transition to reusables, which can lead to significant cost savings and reduced waste. The company also focuses on creating a more eco-friendly environment by reducing plastic waste and improving product quality throughout the supply chain process.

Name: Tranco Global
Description: Tranco Global is a full-service transportation provider that offers logistics solutions for both domestic and international moves. Their services include air full truckload, less-than-truckload, wareage, ocean customs clearance, and direct billing. Tranco connects shippers with experienced representatives who provide 24/7 support and focuses on building long-term relationships with carrier partners to enhance service excellence. The company aims to simplify the logistics process by offering tailored solutions and transparent communication.

Name: Transition Solutions
Description: Transition Solutions is a service that assists individuals and employers in navigating career transitions. They offer personalized support through dedicated consultants, job market evaluation, resume management, and training for new job seekers. Key features include the CareerDashboard for real-time tracking of career paths, access to virtual conferencing systems, and a global network with over 300 partner offices across six continents, all designed to meet the specific needs of organizations of various sizes.

Name: University of Cincinnati
Description: The University of Cincinnati (UC) is a public university that offers a wide range of academic programs, including undergraduate and graduate degrees, as well as online courses. It provides resources for admissions, financial aid, student life, and campus life, including scholarships and career development opportunities. UC also hosts various events, conferences, and research initiatives aimed at enhancing the educational experience and community engagement. Additionally, it features a commitment to sustainability and community impact through its initiatives like the Green Dot program, which focuses on energy conservation and environmental responsibility.

Name: UniGroup, C.A.
Description: UniGroup, C.A. is a cooperative that provides transportation and logistics solutions for families and businesses across the United States and internationally. It operates several brands, including United Van Lines, Mayflower Transit, and UniGroup Logistics, offering household goods relocation services and supply chain solutions. The company focuses on delivering customized mobility and support to ensure a seamless moving experience for its customers. Additionally, UniGroup offers opportunities for agents and drivers to join their teams as dedicated professionals in the transportation industry.

Name: Universal Relocations
Description: Universal Relocations is a moving company that provides international, interstate, and intrastate relocation services. Their main functionality includes handling everything from removals and logistics to customs clearance for moves between the USA and India. Key features include specialized pet moving services, eco-friendly moving solutions, and a commitment to efficient shipping processes. They also offer flexible storage options and support for families with special needs during the move process.

Name: Updater
Description: Updater is a platform that helps businesses sell complex products and services across various channels, including moving services, home improvement, insurance, and more. Key features include a consumer app for moving professionals, an API for seamless product integration, and tools for managing customer interactions through call centers and websites. Updater aims to streamline the sales process for its partners in the moving industry by centralizing demand and providing reliable distribution options.

Name: UsedConex.com
Description: UsedConex.com is a company that specializes in selling used shipping containers at discounted prices. They offer a variety of container types, including tunnel and open-side containers, which are designed for storage and export purposes. The service includes options for purchasing, renting, modifications, and moving services to ensure safe and functional storage solutions. Customers can browse and purchase different types of shipping containers tailored for various needs, with features such as fully functional doors, minimal repairs, and watertight dimensions.

Name: Velaw
Description: velaw is a law firm that provides legal services across various industries, including energy, banking, and corporate matters. The firm specializes in areas such as antitrust, environmental justice, corporate governance, and regulatory compliance. Key features include specialized practice for clients like oil and gas, renewable energy, and healthcare issues, along with resources for students and career development in the legal field. Velaw also offers news updates and educational programs to keep professionals informed about developments in the law.

Name: VIP Transport, Inc.
Description: VIP Transport is a professional moving company that offers residential, commercial, fine art, life sciences, and specialized logistics services across the United States. They provide transportation management, storage solutions, and climate-controlled warehousing for various needs, including small shipments and large container moves. Key features include guaranteed pricing with no deposits, background-checked crews, real-time temperature monitoring from pickup to delivery, and flexible warehouse terms without upfront fees. VIP Transport serves over 500,000 families and businesses annually, ensuring reliable support throughout the moving process.

Name: Virtual Moving Technologies
Description: Virtual Moving Technologies offers a suite of tools designed for virtual moving and relocation services. Their main product, the Virtual Move Survey, allows customers to complete surveys at their convenience or use existing technology for accurate estimates. Additional features include Snapshot AI Turbo for instant move estimates, a mobile app for easy access to expert support, and a focus on reducing in-person customer stress during moves.

Name: WareSpace
Description: WareSpace is a rental space provider that offers small, self-storage and distribution spaces for small businesses across 20 cities in the USA. It provides a range of amenities including shared loading docks, climate-controlled facilities, secure WiFi, and 24/7 on-site support. The service allows tenants to rent out their own warehouse units with flexible leasing terms starting at $1,000 per month, with immediate availability available within specific locations. Key features include daily carrier pickup, kitchen and lounge access, secure Wi-Fi, and dedicated management services to assist tenants throughout the rental process.

Name: Wayne Moving & Storage
Description: Wayne Moving & Storage is a moving and logistics company serving the Tri-State Area. They provide a range of services including corporate relocations, mergers and restacks, healthcare IT relocation, educational moves, household goods relocation, and specialized storage solutions. Their main functionality includes designing custom move plans, managing inventory, and ensuring timely delivery and installation of essential items throughout the relocation process.

Name: Weichert
Description: Weichert provides corporate relocation and workforce mobility solutions for employees moving globally. Their main services include advisory support, supply chain management, household goods management, and government services tailored to meet the specific needs of businesses. The WeicherT Go platform offers data-driven insights to enhance decision-making and budgeting related to employee relocation programs, while also providing a mobile app called Lump Sum App that facilitates compliance and reporting.

Name: Wilkins & Associates Real Estate
Description: Wilkins & Associates is a real estate company specializing in residential, commercial, and relocation services in the Poconos region of Pennsylvania. They offer listings for homes, condos, and investment properties, as well as property management services. The team consists of over 100 full-time Realtors who provide buyer and seller support, ensuring clients receive personalized assistance throughout the buying or selling process. Additionally, they have a dedicated Relocation Department that assists with moving within specific communities.

Name: NBS Commercial Interiors
Description: NBS is an interior integrator that specializes in creating customized commercial and educational spaces. Their main services include architectural construction, floorcovering, furniture design, audiovisual solutions, and cleaning services for various sectors such as corporate, healthcare, and education. NBS focuses on transforming spaces through tailored plans, ensuring productivity, engagement, and innovation, while also providing support for move management and delivery. They offer a range of products including mobile office solutions and interactive learning experiences to enhance workplace experiences.

Name: Zebra Technologies Corp.
Description: Zebra offers technology solutions designed to enhance operational efficiency across various industries, including retail, healthcare, transportation, and public sector. Their products include mobile devices for asset tracking, inventory management, customer service, and communication, aimed at improving overall business performance and reducing costs. Key features include real-time data capture, automated workflows, and integration with existing systems to streamline processes and improve decision-making. Zebra also provides tailored solutions that support businesses in areas such as field operations, food safety, manufacturing, and government services.
